description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.4 Docker image with postgres:latest and justinribeiro/chrome-headless:latest services, and set POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables. Define a cache named bundler keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME that stores cache/bundler/. Add an rspec job in the default test stage that uses a custom before_script `bundle install --path=cache/bundler --without production --jobs $(nproc) "${FLAGS[@]}"`, applies the bundler cache, and runs the script `RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rake test`. The pipeline also includes a global before_script that updates apt, installs postgresql, cmake, prints ruby and node versions, installs bundler gem, runs a full bundle install, copies configuration files, and prepares the test database, but the rspec job overrides it with its own before_script.
